The '''Regulator X-Q2 System Patrol Cruiser''', also known as the '''Regulator''', was a scout [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufactured by [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]].

The Regulator X-Q2 was one-hundred-and-fifty meters in length, and could transport up to fifteen troopers and five hundred metric tons of cargo. The vessel required a crew of nine to operate, with five of those onboard serving as [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]] for the ship's [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. As with the [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|IPV-1 system patrol craft]], the Regulator was not equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].

They were used to patrol spaces that were already pacified.

Two of the vessels served in the [[Battle of Bissillirus]] at the [[Bissillirus Resupply Base]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The X-Q2 appears in ''[[West End Games]]'' ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Kit]]''.

In the adventure ''[[Return to Bundim]]'', one of the suggested actions is to capture an X-Q2 and use it to run the blockade at [[Bundim]].
